function.name: home_db_get_device_description
function.description: Get the technical description of the named device, optionally specifying the zone in which the device is located.

device_name.description: the human-readable name of the device.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where device is located, optional.

function.name: home_db_list_devices
function.description: List all devices of a certain type or 'all' keyword for any type, optionally specifying the zone where the devices are located.

device_type.description: the human-readable device type or 'all' for any type.

zone_name.description: the name of the zone where devices are located, optional.
